title: Typed Records, Missingness, Provenance, Validation, and Rejection · Runtime Lens: Typed Record Schema
summary: The scraper emits loose dictionaries, converts missing prices to zero, drops source locations, and keeps partly invalid rows because most fields look useful. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the typed record schema increment in typed provenance-preserving extraction record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory…
objectives: Model raw, parsed, normalized, validated, and exported fields with dataclasses or typed records and a versioned schema.
Distinguish missing, empty, malformed, relative, repeated, and multi-valued attributes and retain the source node for diagnosis.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: scraper-typed-record-schema — Model raw, parsed, normalized, validated, and exported fields with dataclasses or typed records and a versioned schema.
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-typed-records-provenance-2
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-typed-records-provenance-2.
# Case 7417: a privacy-minimized internal crawl.
# Operating constraint: the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure.
# Changed case: change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope.
def worked_scraper_typed_records_provenance_2(raw_records: int = 12, valid_records: int = 9, quarantined_records: int = 3, provenance_records: int = 12, schema_version: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorizationworked2",
        "url7417",
        "response2dekrow",
        "treeworked27417",
        "frontier7417worked2",
        "report2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if raw_records < 1 or valid_records < 0 or quarantined_records < 0:
        return False, raw_records, "record-count"
    if valid_records + quarantined_records != raw_records:
        return False, valid_records, "record-reconciliation"
    if provenance_records != raw_records:
        return False, provenance_records, "provenance-gap"
    if schema_version < 1:
        return False, schema_version, "schema-version"
    assert valid_records + quarantined_records == raw_records
    return True, valid_records, "typed-extraction-records"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-typed-record-schema-y3sus3
# Competency: scraper-typed-record-schema.
# Case 1683: a clean package and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: no block, CAPTCHA, identity, or fingerprint evasion is permitted.
# Changed case: introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it.
def evidence_scraper_typed_record_schema_y3sus3(raw_records: int = 12, valid_records: int = 9, quarantined_records: int = 3, provenance_records: int = 12, schema_version: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_y3sus3 = "y3sus3-3sus3y-1683"
    assert evidence_variant_y3sus3
    evidence_axes_y3sus3 = (
        "authorizationy3sus3",
        "url1683",
        "response3sus3y",
        "treey3sus31683",
        "frontier1683y3sus3",
        "report3sus3y1683",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_y3sus3)) == 6
    if raw_records < 1 or valid_records < 0 or quarantined_records < 0:
        return False, raw_records, "record-count"
    if valid_records + quarantined_records != raw_records:
        return False, valid_records, "record-reconciliation"
    if provenance_records != raw_records:
        return False, provenance_records, "provenance-gap"
    if schema_version < 1:
        return False, schema_version, "schema-version"
    assert valid_records + quarantined_records == raw_records
    return True, valid_records, "typed-extraction-records"

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Typed Record Schema structural check is only one gate. typed provenance-preserving extraction record must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

hints: For Authorized crawling and Python Build Typed Record Schema evidence · Theory Typed Record Schema, name the owner, authorization, stakeholder, revision, runtime, dependency, seed, URL, origin, robots, response, parser, selector, record, frontier, privacy, report, stop, recovery, and transfer boundary, Typed Record Schema precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Authorized crawling and Python Build Typed Record Schema evidence · Theory Typed Record Schema, trace this concrete input and predict authorization, URL admission, robots, fetch, redirect, decode, parse, extract, provenance, schedule, report, rejection, stop, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A theory site-quality team handles case 5243 during a local-server failure rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate typed missingness, raw and normalized fields, provenance, schema identity, and explicit rejection; no block, CAPTCHA, identity, or fingerprint evasion is permitted; then introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Model raw, parsed, normalized, validated, and exported fields with dataclasses or typed records and a versioned schema.

For Authorized crawling and Python Build Typed Record Schema evidence · Theory Typed Record Schema, challenge the documented misconception with changed-authorization, URL, robots rule, response, encoding, markup, selector, frontier, timing, session, browser, privacy, security, export, failure, recovery, and controlled owner transfer evidence: A dictionary with familiar keys is a sufficient data contract.

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Typed Record Schema model · Theory Typed Record Schema
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Typed Record Schema: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory site-quality team handles case 3624 during a multilingual public-service site review. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate typed missingness, raw and normalized fields, provenance, schema identity, and explicit rejection; no block, CAPTCHA, identity, or fingerprint evasion is permitted; then change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Model raw, parsed, normalized, validated, and exported fields with dataclasses or typed records and a versioned schema.

Evidence target: Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Typed Record Schema model · Theory Typed Record Schema.
steps.why: Retrieving Typed Record Schema through the concrete typed provenance-preserving extraction record case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Typed Record Schema model · Theory Typed Record Schema, keep Typed Record Schema connected to executable Python authorization, URL, response, parse, provenance, frontier, report, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense

checks.description: The cumulative python portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker # Evidence: scraper-typed-record-schema-y3sus3.

checks.pattern: # Evidence: scraper-typed-record-schema-y3sus3(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_scraper_typed_record_schema_y3sus3\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?raw_records < 1 or valid_records < 0 or quarantined_records < 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?valid_records \+ quarantined_records != raw_records)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?provenance_records != raw_records)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?schema_version < 1)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
